mapper.delete:
delete from kb_basic_log where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_basic_log t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.id},'%')
AND t.basic_id like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.basicId},'%')
AND t.old_category like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.oldCategory},'%')
AND t.new_category like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.newCategory},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbBaiscLogEntity.createTime},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select kb.id as id, kbl.id as logId, kb.title as title, csu.real_name as createUser, kbl.create_time as pubTime, kc.name as ctName, kc1.name as oldctName from kb_basic_log kbl join kb_basic kb on kbl.basic_id = kb.id left join castle_sys_user csu on kbl.create_user = csu.id left join kb_category kc on kbl.new_category = kc.id left join kb_category kc1 on kbl.old_category = kc1.id
kbl.type = 1 and kb.is_deleted = 2
and kb.title like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.title},'%')
and kbl.create_time like concat(#{kbBaseShowDto.fromTime},'%')
and csu.real_name like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.userName},'%')
and kbl.create_user = #{userId}
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select count(1) from kb_basic_log kbl join kb_basic kb on kbl.basic_id = kb.id left join castle_sys_user csu on kbl.create_user = csu.id left join kb_category kc on kbl.new_category = kc.id left join kb_category kc1 on kbl.old_category = kc1.id
kbl.type = 1 and kb.is_deleted = 2
and kb.title like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.title},'%')
and kbl.create_time like concat(#{kbBaseShowDto.fromTime},'%')
and csu.real_name like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.userName},'%')
and kbl.create_user = #{userId}

select kb.id as id, kbl.id as logId, kb.title as title, csu.real_name as createUser, kbl.create_time as pubTime, kc.name as ctName, kc1.name as oldctName from kb_basic_log kbl join kb_video kb on kbl.basic_id = kb.id left join castle_sys_user csu on kbl.create_user = csu.id left join kb_category kc on kbl.new_category = kc.id left join kb_category kc1 on kbl.old_category = kc1.id
kbl.type = 2 and kb.is_deleted = 2
and kb.title like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.title},'%')
and kbl.create_time like concat(#{kbBaseShowDto.fromTime},'%')
and csu.real_name like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.userName},'%')
and kbl.create_user = #{userId}
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select count(1) from kb_basic_log kbl join kb_video kb on kbl.basic_id = kb.id left join castle_sys_user csu on kbl.create_user = csu.id left join kb_category kc on kbl.new_category = kc.id left join kb_category kc1 on kbl.old_category = kc1.id
kbl.type = 2 and kb.is_deleted = 2
and kb.title like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.title},'%')
and kbl.create_time like concat(#{kbBaseShowDto.fromTime},'%')
and csu.real_name like concat('%',#{kbBaseShowDto.userName},'%')
and kbl.create_user = #{userId}
